recipe.title: Best roast potatoes
recipe.description: This roast potato recipe takes your roasties to the next level.

ingredients.name: medium floury potatoes
ingredients.note: such as Maris Piper, King Edward

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh woody herbs

steps.descr: GET AHEAD Peel the potatoes, keeping them whole, and...
steps.instructions: GET AHEAD Peel the potatoes, keeping them whole, and ideally all about the same size (8cm). Parboil them in a pan of boiling salted water for 15 minutes – this will ensure that the insides become really fluffy.

on_enter.say: GET AHEAD Peel the potatoes, keeping them whole, and ideally all about the same size (8cm). Parboil them in a pan of boiling salted water for 15 minutes – this will ensure that the insides become really fluffy.

steps.descr: Drain in a colander and leave to steam dry for 2 minutes...
steps.instructions: Drain in a colander and leave to steam dry for 2 minutes – this will help the fat to stick to the potatoes. Give the colander a few light shakes to chuff up the edges of the potatoes, giving you maximum surface area for a crispy exterior as they roast.

on_enter.say: Drain in a colander and leave to steam dry for 2 minutes – this will help the fat to stick to the potatoes. Give the colander a few light shakes to chuff up the edges of the potatoes, giving you maximum surface area for a crispy exterior as they roast.

steps.descr: Place the goose fat or butter and 1 tablespoon of oil in...
steps.instructions: Place the goose fat or butter and 1 tablespoon of oil in your largest roasting tray. Tip in the potatoes, add a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then toss to coat, and spread out in one fairly snug, even layer but with small gaps between them.

on_enter.say: Place the goose fat or butter and 1 tablespoon of oil in your largest roasting tray. Tip in the potatoes, add a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then toss to coat, and spread out in one fairly snug, even layer but with small gaps between them.

steps.descr: Cover and pop in the fridge overnight
steps.instructions: Cover and pop in the fridge overnight. Or, you can make these up to 1 month in advance – simply leave to cool, then cover and pop in the freezer.

on_enter.say: Cover and pop in the fridge overnight. Or, you can make these up to 1 month in advance – simply leave to cool, then cover and pop in the freezer.

steps.descr: ON THE DAY Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/gas 4
steps.instructions: ON THE DAY Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/gas 4.

on_enter.say: ON THE DAY Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/gas 4.

steps.descr: Squash the garlic bulbs, then lightly crush each...
steps.instructions: Squash the garlic bulbs, then lightly crush each unpeeled clove and add to the tray – this gives you sweet, caramelised garlic and adds a gentle perfume to the potatoes.

on_enter.say: Squash the garlic bulbs, then lightly crush each unpeeled clove and add to the tray – this gives you sweet, caramelised garlic and adds a gentle perfume to the potatoes.

steps.descr: Roast for 1 hour, or until the potatoes are crisp and...
steps.instructions: Roast for 1 hour, or until the potatoes are crisp and golden all over (if cooking straight from frozen, roast for 1 hour 15 minutes).

on_enter.say: Roast for 1 hour, or until the potatoes are crisp and golden all over (if cooking straight from frozen, roast for 1 hour 15 minutes).

steps.descr: Remove the tray from the oven
steps.instructions: Remove the tray from the oven. We’re nearly there, but we’ve got one last application of love and care, which is the game-changer. Gently half-squash each potato with a fish slice or masher so they kind of push into each other and fill the tray.

on_enter.say: Remove the tray from the oven. We’re nearly there, but we’ve got one last application of love and care, which is the game-changer. Gently half-squash each potato with a fish slice or masher so they kind of push into each other and fill the tray.

steps.descr: Pick the herb leaves and – importantly – toss with a...
steps.instructions: Pick the herb leaves and – importantly – toss with a little oil (this will transmit the flavour and make them deliciously crisp). Sprinkle over the potatoes and roast for a further 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden and amazing. Heaven – you could even serve these on their own in a restaurant, they’re so good.

on_enter.say: Pick the herb leaves and – importantly – toss with a little oil (this will transmit the flavour and make them deliciously crisp). Sprinkle over the potatoes and roast for a further 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden and amazing. Heaven – you could even serve these on their own in a restaurant, they’re so good.
